steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The passage sets up a pattern: the Nobel Prize is often given to “a single person,” then pivots with But, signaling that recognition isn't restricted to one type of individual. The following Instead reinforces this by emphasizing that success is usually achieved through collaboration. The blank must name what kind of individuals the passage is moving away from.

steps.title: Apply the contrast
steps.content: Solitary names individuals working alone—the direct opposite of collaboration. The sentence “recognition isn't restricted to solitary individuals” means the prize extends beyond isolated work to collaborative achievement, matching the pivot. The other three either contradict the needed contrast (coordinated) or are contextually unrelated (considerate, coincidental). That matches choice A — A is correct.
